gen7.note: Consistency/rollout pass: the gen-6 polish (reporting-currency, export, tag-filter) was built but not adopted on every page. Roll it out everywhere + a shared format-boundary module + deep-linkable URL state + a global holdings index. The PM ideation auditing adoption (not just adding features) is exactly the right maturity signal.

stats: main: ~77 PR merges, ~3116 tests, ~39 routes, dark/light theme, Cmd-K palette, a11y, export. Healthy.
trajectory: App is now feature-complete + polished. Asked gen-8 ideation to be honest about saturation and weigh production-readiness vs more features.
